description: Task creation, status mutation, prioritization, filtering, and workflow recap workflows.
design_rules: Tasks must stay vendor-neutral within the category.
Tasks should be short enough for high sample count and repeated simulation.
Fake tools should preserve differentiated product logic, not just naming differences.

core_tasks.title: Create a task
core_tasks.goal: Create a new task or issue from a short instruction.

core_tasks.title: Update status
core_tasks.goal: Move a task to a new state.

core_tasks.title: Filter tasks
core_tasks.goal: Return a filtered task view by status/owner/label.

core_tasks.title: Recap workflow state
core_tasks.goal: Summarize what is blocked, active, and next.

reserve_tasks.title: Group tasks by theme
reserve_tasks.goal: Cluster tasks by a shared topic.

explicit_exclusions: Vendor-specific board automation as a required task
